title: linum alpinum subsp. bertolonii
intro: Linum alpinum subsp. bertolonii, also known as Bertolon's flax, is a subspecies of the Linum alpinum plant, which is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bertolon's flax include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Linum alpinum subsp. bertolonii is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
